ThingDef.label: oak wood
ThingDef.description: Dense hardwood with excellent durability, commonly used in construction.

ThingDef.label: maple wood
ThingDef.description: Strong hardwood valued for fine furniture and stability.

ThingDef.label: teak wood
ThingDef.description: Extremely durable tropical hardwood resistant to decay and moisture.

ThingDef.label: cypress wood
ThingDef.description: Resin-rich wood with good insulation properties.

ThingDef.label: pine wood
ThingDef.description: Common softwood, lightweight and widely used.

ThingDef.label: birch wood
ThingDef.description: Light decorative wood with attractive appearance.

ThingDef.label: poplar wood
ThingDef.description: Fast-growing softwood, weak but abundant.

ThingDef.label: willow wood
ThingDef.description: Flexible wood with low structural strength.

ThingDef.label: cocoa wood
ThingDef.description: Tropical wood with moderate durability and warmth.

ThingDef.label: palm wood
ThingDef.description: Light tropical wood with moderate insulation.

ThingDef.label: bamboo
ThingDef.description: Light but brittle plant material.

ThingDef.label: cecropia wood
ThingDef.description: Soft tropical wood with low density.

ThingDef.label: anima wood
ThingDef.description: Rare spiritual wood. Cutting it has consequences.

ThingDef.label: gauranlen wood
ThingDef.description: Living-feeling wood with warm organic tones.

ThingDef.label: polux wood
ThingDef.description: Heavy clay-like wood, strong but unattractive.

ThingDef.label: harbinger wood
ThingDef.description: Dense mahogany-like wood of high durability, carrying a faint tint of lifeless decay.

ThingDef.label: archean wood
ThingDef.description: Ultra-rare ancient wood with exceptional strength and energy density.

ThingDef.label: snagroot wood
ThingDef.description: Brittle, low-quality wood with poor structural properties.

ThingDef.label: witchwood
ThingDef.description: Strange, dark wood with unstable structure and poor quality.

ThingDef.label: rat palm wood
ThingDef.description: Strange palm wood that burns exceptionally well but is aesthetically unremarkable.

ThingDef.label: gray pine wood
ThingDef.description: Hardy but dull-looking variant of pine wood.

ThingDef.label: bonsai wood
ThingDef.description: Dense ornamental wood prized for its beauty rather than strength.
